name: Julian Lage
abstract: Julian Price Lage ( LAHZH; born December 25, 1987) is an American guitarist and composer. A child prodigy, Lage performed at the 2000 Grammy Awards at age 12, and at 15, became a faculty member of the Stanford Jazz Workshop.

concerts.label: Carnegie Hall Notables: (un)common threads: Blurring Genres in the 21st Century
A Notables-Exclusive Event: Julian Lage, Guitar

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I used to do them every year... I’m going to bring this 12-year-old guitar player with me... Based on that, I started hiring Julian to play little gigs here and there... I think it’s time we made a record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: I had Taylor Eigsti, Julian Lage, Grace Kelly, I’ve been really, really fortunate.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
